---
title: "Manim External"
---

## TNB Frame — Full Manim Animation

This launches a full Jupyter environment in the cloud via
[Binder](https://mybinder.org), where you can run the Manim TNB frame
animation and edit the curve $\vec{r}(t)$ directly in a notebook cell.

::: {.callout-note}
**First launch takes 1–2 minutes** while Binder builds the environment.
Subsequent launches are faster.
:::

### What to do once it opens

1. The notebook opens automatically
2. Edit `r_sym` and the `t_start` / `t_end` values in **Cell 2**
3. Click **Run All** (or press `Shift+Enter` through each cell)
4. The animation renders and plays inline

::: {=html}
<div style="margin: 2rem 0; text-align: center;">
  <a href="https://mybinder.org/v2/gh/connorfitz10/my-site/master?filepath=notebooks/tnb_frame.ipynb"
     target="_blank"
     style="display:inline-block; padding:.75rem 2rem; background:#f37626;
            color:#fff; font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:600; border-radius:6px;
            text-decoration:none; box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.2);">
    🚀 Launch Manim Notebook
  </a>
</div>

<div style="text-align:center; margin-top:1rem;">
  <img src="https://mybinder.org/badge_logo.svg" alt="Binder badge" />
</div>
:::

### Example curves to try

| Curve | `r_sym` |
|-------|---------|
| Default (Lissajous) | `s.Matrix([2*cos(3*t), 2*sin(t), 2*cos(2*t)])` |
| Helix | `s.Matrix([cos(t), sin(t), 0.3*t])` |
| Trefoil knot | `s.Matrix([sin(t)+2*sin(2*t), cos(t)-2*cos(2*t), -sin(3*t)])` |
| Torus knot | `s.Matrix([(2+cos(3*t))*cos(2*t), (2+cos(3*t))*sin(2*t), sin(3*t)])` |
